_note: Synthetic placeholder data so the dashboard renders before real heal_results.jsonl/_corpus.jsonl/clusters.json land. Replace by writing those files into the dashboard/ directory (or symlink them). When real files are present, this seed is ignored.

clusters.error_signature: AttributeError: 'NoneType' object has no attribute 'invoke' (langchain Runnable)
ValidationError: 1 validation error for ChatPromptTemplate input_variables
openai.BadRequestError: tool_use block has no matching tool_result
TypeError: graph.add_node() got unexpected keyword argument 'name' (langgraph)
RecursionError: maximum recursion depth exceeded in CrewAI agent loop
KeyError: 'output' missing from autogen GroupChatManager response
JSONDecodeError: Expecting value when parsing tool_call arguments (llama_index)

heal_results.patch:
--- a/agent.py
+++ b/agent.py
@@
-    chain = build_chain()
-    return chain.invoke({"q": q})
+    chain = build_chain()
+    if chain is None:
+        raise RuntimeError("build_chain() returned None")
+    return chain.invoke({"q": q})

--- a/prompts.py
+++ b/prompts.py
@@
-PROMPT = ChatPromptTemplate.from_messages([("user", "{question}")])
+PROMPT = ChatPromptTemplate.from_messages([("user", "{question}")])
+# input_variables now resolved from template
-PROMPT.input_variables = ["q"]
+PROMPT.input_variables = ["question"]

--- a/crew.py
+++ b/crew.py
@@
-crew = Crew(agents=[a, b], process=Process.hierarchical)
+crew = Crew(agents=[a, b], process=Process.hierarchical, max_iter=5)

heal_results.reason: patch did not pass AST gate
